title: Crazy Diamond - JCraft Datapack
description: A datapack for JCraft: Eyes of Ender that adds Crazy Diamond over The Hand
body:
something something in progress
# Crazy Diamond for JCraft
- Adds a scrappy version of Crazy Diamond from JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Diamond is Unbreakable
- Remodeled over The World and replacing The Hand
- Brand new animations and moves
  - Cr.M1: Forward kick
  - Sp1: Healing ability
  - Sp2: Bullet/Boomerang-like Glass shard
  - Sp3: Effect giving grab
  - Heavy: Damageless donut, gives bleeding with great stun
  - Utility: Ground barrage DORARARARARARARA
